metadataDescription: Traveler and host services designed to book, welcome and manage with confidence.
title: Everything you need to travel and host with confidence
description: GuestConnect brings together the essential services of a premium accommodation marketplace: clear search, secure booking, host tools and human support.
travelerDescription: Book faster, compare better and stay in control before, during and after your stay.
hostDescription: Showcase your property, manage availability and grow bookings with a simple experience.
trustTitle: A clear framework for every booking
trustDescription: Photos, rules, pricing, policies and key information are structured to reduce doubt and improve conversion.
ctaDescription: Explore available stays or start listing your property.

items.secureBookingDesc: A clear flow, visible information and confirmation designed to reassure.
items.smartSearchDesc: Destination, dates and guests stay at the center of the mobile journey.
items.supportDesc: A simple entry point for questions before or after booking.
items.hostToolsDesc: Listing management, pricing, availability and key information.
items.visibilityDesc: A more editorial presentation to showcase every property.
items.dashboardDesc: A dashboard space to track bookings, listings and activity.
